name: Nakayama Steel Works, Ltd.
summary: Nakayama Steel Works, Ltd. engages in the steel, engineering, and real estate businesses in Japan. It offers steel coil products, including hot, pickling, plating, slit, and striped /pattern coils; and steel sheet products, such as thick steel and NP steel plates, leveler sheets, and checkered steel and pattern steel plates, as well as hot rolled steel products. The company also provides bars and wire rod products comprising steel bars, burn-in- coils, and wire rods, as well as lightweight C-shaped steel products, steel pipes, steel sheets, secondary products, and by-products. In addition, it offers steel reefs to marine businesses; casting machine engineering products, including rolls, valves, and casting and processing equipment; and plans, designs, and constructs factories, warehouses, offices, etc. Further, the company engages in processing and selling of construction related products; selling of building materials; selling, brokerage, and rental of real estate properties; and port transportation and freight vehicle transportation services. Additionally, it provides general shipping and shipping brokerage services; and environmental services. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
